## Review flags (automatic, not edits)

Each text block may include zero or more flags:

- `too_long_for_grade`
- `possible_adult_language`
- `mixed_language`
- `contains_formula_or_symbols`
- `contains_directional_rtl_ltr_mix`
- `possible_factual_claim`
- `possible_instruction`
- `possible_placeholder`
- `draft_marker_found`
- `verify_marker_found`
